pi_items.source: Task description strictly instructs the agent to change Status to 'Closed'.
Task description strictly instructs the agent to enter 'Replaced primary cutting blade and balanced deck.'
Task description strictly instructs the agent to add comment 'Field technician completed repair on site.'
Task description strictly instructs the agent to change the Status from 'Out-of-service' to 'In Service'.
Task description strictly instructs the agent to set the Date in Service to '2026-03-09'.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the prerequisite Asset ('Mower ZTR-5000-A1') and Ticket ('URGENT: Broken Blade on Mower') are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via a shell script in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected ticket status ('Closed'), solution phrase ('Replaced primary cutting blade'), and comment phrase ('technician completed repair') exactly match the explicit task description instructions. Similarly, the expected asset status ('In Service') and date ('2026-03-09') explicitly match the prompt description. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
